x4freetext: Hydrogen recoil counter (6 inch long, 1.5 inch inner
These datasets may include inelastic excitation of
the levels up to at least 100 keV (if they exist).
The potential substantial (n,n`) contribution to the
excitation from 100 to 200 keV was experimentally
checked in this experiment by comparison of counts
from two hydrogen counters having different pulse
scattering cross section derived with total cross
